subcodes.title: Words to Alma Albertson et al, spoken on 1900-11-28
subcodes.first_line: Man becomes like a stone unless he continually supplicates to God. The heart of man is like a mirror... There are many subjects which are difficult for man to solve... In the highest prayer... When a man falls in love with a human being
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان در متعالی ترین شکل نیایش خود فقط به منظور ابراز عشق و محبت به حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @importance of prayer, @love of God, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
